results.title: Microwave ray gun controls crowds with noise - New Scientist
excerpts: A US company claims it is ready to build a microwave ray gun able to beam sounds directly into people's heads. The device – dubbed MEDUSA (Mob Excess Deterrent Using Silent Audio) – exploits
